figures.caption: Fig. 3. Average success rate comparison between baselines (Random Sampling [13], CEM [13], iCEM [13], TQC+HER [9], TQC+HER+TL [6], CEE-US [3] and PointFlowMatch [14]) and our proposed iCEM+TL framework with RR on Stack, Slide and Shelf tasks. Standard deviation values are represented as shadows. Planning horizon HSlide=50, HStack and HShelf=1000. Sample Size=40. Elite Size=20

Fig. 1. Diagram of our iCEM+TL framework showing at timestep t the last iteration of our inner loop (i = I− 1) with the output of the action at. Color blue is the additional processes of our proposed method integrating iCEM with TL and RR.

Fig. 5. Average success rate comparison between iCEM and iCEM+TL with standard deviation values. (a) Enabling and disabling task decomposition features (TL & RR) for the Stack and Shelf tasks. (b) Different sample size settings with iCEM+TL framework on Stack task (transfer from Pick&Place) with 1000 Timesteps and Slide task (transfer from Push) with 50 Timesteps. Elite Size=20. (c) Different elite size settings with iCEM+TL framework on Stack task (transfer from Pick&Place) with 1000 Timestep and 100 Sample Size and Slide task (transfer from Push) with 50 timestep and 300 Sample Size.
